title: Add suggested condition control
definition: The native per-suggestion action that is available when the suggestion is not considered already present on the work order.

facts.statement: The control is suppressed when an existing condition matches the suggestion's scalar and string filter identity; operator, comparison value, and contained-reagent indexes are not part of that already-present test.
The control uses the native WORK_ORDERS_ADD_SUGGESTED_CONDITION interface asset.

positive: A suggested filter with no matching existing condition exposes the add action.
boundary: An otherwise matching existing condition with a different operator, value, or contained-reagent indexes still suppresses the control.
counterexamples: A difference in a scalar or string filter field leaves the control available; suppressing the control does not remove the row text.

absenceGuards: Do not include operator, comparison value, or contained-reagent indexes in the native already-present test.
Do not hide the suggested row when only this control is suppressed.

requiredFrames: Control present for a nonmatching suggestion
Control absent for a matching suggestion while row text remains visible
